title: boerhavia diffusa var. viscosa
intro: Boerhavia diffusa var. viscosa, also known as sticky hogweed or sticky desert heliotrope, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments, with its roots, leaves, and stems exhibiting medicinal properties that aid in reducing inflammation, fever, and pain. The health benefits of Boerhavia diffusa var. viscosa include its ability to improve digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and fever.
